title: I started a Monday doc & can't find it
excerpt: I started a Monday doc and days later unable to find it. I am on so many Workspaces and boards in my organization, and struggle to remember where everything ends up. I am not sure what Workspace it is in or if it is in a…

posts.author: Katelynn (Katelynn Zuiderveen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I started a Monday doc and days later unable to find it. I am on so many Workspaces and boards in my organization, and struggle to remember where everything ends up. I am not sure what Workspace it is in or if it is in a Monday Doc column on a specific board. I just have a vague idea of the title or contents.
What is the best approach to finding the document?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you tried doing a search across the account for a keyword? Cmd+B/Cntrl+B

posts.author: Katelynn (Katelynn Zuiderveen)
posts.cookedHtml: I did not know about the “quick search.” How does this function different than all of the other places to search in Monday?

posts.author: Katelynn (Katelynn Zuiderveen)
posts.cookedHtml: Never mind! I found an article in the Monday help center.
